outline:
Genesis 37:4-8 (2:33): The story of Joseph and his dreams, used to explain the importance of being selective about who you share your prophetic words with

Genesis 37:19 (5:19): References the brothers' reaction to Joseph as the "dreamer," highlighting the spiritual opposition that can arise when sharing a vision.
scriptures: 1 Samuel 9 & 10 (6:13, 8:26): Discusses Saul's experience with Samuel and why he wisely kept the matter of his kingship quiet initially.
reflection: Ephesians 5:15-16 (16:02): Used to teach about discerning and grabbing divine opportunities orchestrated by God.
